name: Raichu

forms.name: Alola
forms.pokedexDescription: When you rub its cheeks, a sweet fragrance comes wafting out. However, you'll also get a light shock!

forms.name: Mega-X
forms.pokedexDescription: It resembles an X as it flies through the air with 50 million volts of electricity sparking from its ears and forked tail.

forms.name: Mega-Y
forms.pokedexDescription: It fires bolts of electricity from the tip of its tail and from the spiky tufts of fur growing out of its temples. This electricity forms the letter Y.

pokedexDescription: This Pokémon exudes a weak electrical charge from all over its body that makes it take on a slight glow in darkness. Raichu plants its tail in the ground to discharge electricity.
